## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Marcel's new AI-powered content marketing startup and explore potential collaboration/support opportunities with Sam.](https://fathom.video/share/TCt3ZJrjhZ5SsZdmg7FJPxgFrYcfkfFr?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's startup has reached $3M ARR in 6 months, with 25 customers including major tech companies](https://fathom.video/share/TCt3ZJrjhZ5SsZdmg7FJPxgFrYcfkfFr?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [They're facing scaling challenges around engineering capacity and considering raising a seed round](https://fathom.video/share/TCt3ZJrjhZ5SsZdmg7FJPxgFrYcfkfFr?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Sam offered fundraising advice and potential investor connections to help Marcel navigate the process](https://fathom.video/share/TCt3ZJrjhZ5SsZdmg7FJPxgFrYcfkfFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
  - [Both see opportunities for knowledge sharing and potential collaboration as they build AI tools/platforms](https://fathom.video/share/TCt3ZJrjhZ5SsZdmg7FJPxgFrYcfkfFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)

## Topics

### Startup Progress and Current State

  - [Launched after successful workshops with Hank, grew organically through word-of-mouth](https://fathom.video/share/TCt3ZJrjhZ5SsZdmg7FJPxgFrYcfkfFr?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [Now at $3M ARR, 25 customers including Rand ($27K/month contract)](https://fathom.video/share/TCt3ZJrjhZ5SsZdmg7FJPxgFrYcfkfFr?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [7-person team including CTO Daniel (ex-Canopy)](https://fathom.video/share/TCt3ZJrjhZ5SsZdmg7FJPxgFrYcfkfFr?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [Signed $1M in new ARR last month, now facing scaling challenges](https://fathom.video/share/TCt3ZJrjhZ5SsZdmg7FJPxgFrYcfkfFr?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)

### Technical Challenges and Platform Development

  - [Outgrowing no-code tools like Airtable, building custom runtime layer](https://fathom.video/share/TCt3ZJrjhZ5SsZdmg7FJPxgFrYcfkfFr?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Developing advanced retrieval, custom knowledge bases, and complex multi-step workflows](https://fathom.video/share/TCt3ZJrjhZ5SsZdmg7FJPxgFrYcfkfFr?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [Aiming to improve speed/quality of AI+human hybrid content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/TCt3ZJrjhZ5SsZdmg7FJPxgFrYcfkfFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [Considering how much to build in-house vs leverage existing tools/APIs](https://fathom.video/share/TCt3ZJrjhZ5SsZdmg7FJPxgFrYcfkfFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1184.0)

### Fundraising Considerations

  - [Exploring raising a seed round to accelerate hiring/growth](https://fathom.video/share/TCt3ZJrjhZ5SsZdmg7FJPxgFrYcfkfFr?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Targeting $30M+ valuation, concerned about services company perception](https://fathom.video/share/TCt3ZJrjhZ5SsZdmg7FJPxgFrYcfkfFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Sam advised starting with angels/smaller checks to build momentum](https://fathom.video/share/TCt3ZJrjhZ5SsZdmg7FJPxgFrYcfkfFr?tab=summary&timestamp=2136.0)
  - [Suggested leveraging customer relationships (e.g. Ramp) for initial investment](https://fathom.video/share/TCt3ZJrjhZ5SsZdmg7FJPxgFrYcfkfFr?tab=summary&timestamp=2143.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Sam's company (Kepler) building framework for AI agents/workflows](https://fathom.video/share/TCt3ZJrjhZ5SsZdmg7FJPxgFrYcfkfFr?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Marcel's team could potentially beta test Kepler's tools](https://fathom.video/share/TCt3ZJrjhZ5SsZdmg7FJPxgFrYcfkfFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
  - [Opportunity to share learnings on AI architecture, scaling challenges](https://fathom.video/share/TCt3ZJrjhZ5SsZdmg7FJPxgFrYcfkfFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to connect Sam with his CTO for technical discussion](https://fathom.video/share/TCt3ZJrjhZ5SsZdmg7FJPxgFrYcfkfFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1396.0)
  - [Sam to potentially introduce Marcel to AI-savvy angel investor for advice](https://fathom.video/share/TCt3ZJrjhZ5SsZdmg7FJPxgFrYcfkfFr?tab=summary&timestamp=2143.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting/coffee to continue knowledge sharing](https://fathom.video/share/TCt3ZJrjhZ5SsZdmg7FJPxgFrYcfkfFr?tab=summary&timestamp=2536.0)
  - [Marcel to refine pitch materials and begin outreach to initial investors](https://fathom.video/share/TCt3ZJrjhZ5SsZdmg7FJPxgFrYcfkfFr?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)
